foundations.md.description: Master reference for Actian DS — primitives, tokens, scales (Kristina, MD-as-SoT)

foundations.authoring.description: How to edit foundations.md (UX team guide)

foundations.color.description: Color tokens derived from foundations.md sections 1, 2.1, 2.2, 2.5, 2.10, 3.1, 4.1

foundations.borders.description: Border tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.3, 4.2

foundations.spacing.description: Spacing + size tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.7, 2.11, 3.3

foundations.typography.description: Typography tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.8, 3.2, 4.3

foundations.elevation.description: Elevation tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.6, 3.4

foundations.icons.description: Icon color tokens derived from foundations.md section 2.12

foundations.motion.description: Motion + brightness filter tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.9, 3.5

foundations.breakpointGridStructure.description: Breakpoint + grid tokens derived from foundations.md sections 2.4, 3.6

tokens.json.description: DTCG W3C-format design tokens (frozen snapshot until successor generator returns)

components.registries.dskit.description: DS Kit component registry (Figma REST sync)

components.registries.fmkit.description: FM (wireframe) Kit component registry (Figma REST sync)

components.registries.metakit.description: Meta Kit component registry — templates block hand-curated, preserved across syncs

components.registries.styles.description: DS Kit text + effect styles (Figma REST sync)

components.guidelinesIndex.description: Component coverage index (84 entries; CI appends, humans flip _stub on curate)

content.md.description: UI copy guidelines — consolidated reference auto-generated from content/src/*.md (Phase 2). Key renamed from 'content' to 'content.md' in v0.3.2 to resolve dot-notation collision with the 'content.section' collection; mirrors the existing 'foundations.md' precedent. Section order tracks content/src/content-index.md.

accessibility.description: WCAG 2.2 AA guidance for the Actian DS

fmToDsMap.description: FM Kit → DS Kit component mapping for hifi conversion

components.guideline.description: Per-component guideline JSON (44 hand-curated + 41 auto-stubs as of 2026-05-10). _index.json sibling tracks coverage.

content.section.description: Per-component content guidelines (Jeff, folded in 2026-05-11). 37 component files + global-guidelines.md (voice + words-to-avoid) + content-index.md (AI query guide) + format-spec.md (markdown structure + Figma/Word output mapping). Each component file follows When-to-use → Style → Behavior → Do/Don't.
